campaignMessage: Vet-formulated nutrition your pets actually love

products.name: TailWag Salmon Bites
products.description: Grain-free dog treats made with wild-caught salmon. Resealable pouch in teal and coral. Rich in omega-3 for healthy coat and joints.

products.name: PurrBliss Calming Supplement
products.description: Liquid calming supplement for cats with L-theanine and chamomile. Dropper bottle in lavender and white. Unflavored for easy mixing with food.
